calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order To Enforce Subpoena In Out-Of-State Action; Petition
Off Calendar Mar-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances - Court adopted its tentative ruling, PETITIONER MBIA INSURANCE CORPORATION'S Petition For Order To Enforce Subpoena In Out-Of-State Action is granted but conditioned on the prior protective order requiring MBIA to redact the Borrower' names and addresses from all publically available documents or seek to file such documents under Seal. The Borrower's objection to MBIS's subpoena is denied. Order signed in open court. Arlene Barton Judge Pro Tem, not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order To Enforce Subpoena In Out-Of-State Action; Petition
Off Calendar Mar-01-2012 Continued To Mar-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted as modified.
PETITIONER MBIA INSURANCE CORPORATION'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order To Enforce Subpoena In Out-Of-State Action. No courtesy copies of moving papers were received. This matter is continued to March 20, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. Parties shall provide courtesy copies by March 5, 2012. Pro Tem Judge: Arlene Barton, not reported.
